description: Discover business context stakeholders processes pain points controls data and reporting needs with traceable step records.
outputs: business discovery brief and discovery step records

description: Compare business needs against standard capabilities and classify gaps risks decisions and change impacts with traceable step records.
outputs: fit-gap matrix and fit-gap step records

description: Convert discovery and fit-gap findings into implementation-ready requirements acceptance criteria and traceability with step records.
outputs: requirements pack and requirements step records

description: Consult with a business analyst on scope process requirements fit-gap decisions and implementation tradeoffs.
Learn source material with version-aware evidence controlled knowledge notes independent from BA documents.
outputs: knowledge notes and learning step records

description: Clarify document goal audience scope source inputs assumptions questions and evidence needs before drafting.
Generate a Markdown template section outline and writing guidance for a planned BA document.
Draft selected BA document section files from plan template and source inputs while preserving assumptions and questions.
outputs: document section files and writing records

description: Review BA document sections for unsupported claims unclear assumptions missing decisions consistency and readiness.
Merge approved BA document section files into one final Markdown document with export notes when needed.
Use early in ideation or when stuck generating ideas.
Orchestrate multi-agent discussions when you need multiple perspectives or want agents to collaborate.
Use when LLM needs to understand available docs without loading everything.
Use when doc becomes too large (>500 lines) to manage effectively.
Use after drafting to polish written content.
outputs: three-column markdown table with suggested fixes

description: Use when doc produced from multiple subprocesses or needs structural improvement.
Use for quality assurance or before finalizing deliverables. Code Review in other modules runs this automatically, but also useful for document reviews.
Use alongside adversarial review for orthogonal coverage — method-driven not attitude-driven.
Use when you need token-efficient distillates that preserve all information for downstream LLM consumption.
output-location: adjacent to source document or specified output_path

description: Use when you want to change how an agent or workflow behaves — add persistent facts, swap templates, insert activation hooks, or customize menus. Scans what's customizable, picks the right scope (agent vs workflow), writes the override to _bmad/custom/, and verifies the merge. No TOML hand-authoring required.
